## Claim or output that looks wrong

Paste the public-safe claim or synthetic/demo output.

## Evidence class involved

- [ ] exact aggregate
- [ ] sampled evidence
- [ ] reconstructed outbound
- [ ] hydrated reply body
- [ ] inference
- [ ] unsupported or missing evidence
- [ ] unsure

## Expected calibration

What should SendLens have said instead?

## Scope

Campaign, tag, or workspace scope if public-safe.

## Privacy
